claims.subject: AI QBR prep tool
claims.evidence: give me a customer brief. type in the merchant name, it pulls everything from the last six months — usage trends, ticket history with sentiment, csm notes, renewal date, payment behavior, nps responses, recent product issues affecting them — into one document i can actually read in fifteen minutes instead of three hours
claims.object_value: customer brief aggregating last 6 months of usage trends, ticket history with sentiment, CSM notes, renewal date, payment behavior, NPS responses, recent product issues; readable in 15 minutes

claims.subject: AI QBR prep tool
claims.evidence: i don't want it to write the qbr deck for me. i want it to inform the deck. the customer relationship is the relationship and i don't want a generated narrative going to a customer with my name on it. brief me, don't speak for me.
claims.object_value: should not write QBR deck or generate customer-facing narrative
